title: cenchrus nanus
intro: Cenchrus nanus, also known as the dwarf brome grass, is a perennial grass species that belongs to the Poaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The plant is also believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive problems, and acting as an expectorant to help clear mucus from the lungs. In herbal preparations, Cenchrus nanus is often used in teas, infusions, and poultices to take advantage of its medicinal and health benefits.
